task.title: Local syntax check of a local file from an editor
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to do a local syntax check of a local file from an editor.

keywords.indexterm: local syntax checklocal file from an editor

taskbody.prereq: Before you check syntax locally, you must set local build options. You must do this action only once.

step.cmd: Open the file in the z Systems LPEX Editor, COBOL Editor, or PL/I Editor.

In the content area of the editor, right-click and select Local Syntax Check or Save and Syntax Check. The local compiler is started to perform the syntax check. When the syntax check is completed, any errors are displayed. Control is returned to you and you can continue working.
